records.m_Talk_ENG: For instance, we can think of something like the Replacer incident.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For instance, we can think of something like the Replacer incident.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Since Pandora has a lot of experience working with the Administration, I'm certain that they can provide us with some data on the Replacers.

records.m_Talk_FRA: They said they couldn't provide it... yet.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just doing what I must...

records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You know, I applied to this company because... I look up to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You know, I applied to this company because... I look up to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Office Lady Y. You designed her, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Office Lady Y. You designed her, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Office Lady Y. You designed her, didn't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had been cooped up in my room even after becoming an adult.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had been cooped up in my room even after becoming an adult.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had been cooped up in my room even after becoming an adult.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I happened to find out about her while playing Street Counter 8.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I happened to find out about her while playing Street Counter 8.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I happened to find out about her while playing Street Counter 8.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's a character who lost her way even into adulthood but got back up because of childhood admiration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's a character who lost her way even into adulthood but got back up because of childhood admiration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's a character who lost her way even into adulthood but got back up because of childhood admiration.

records.m_Talk_FRA: ...She felt like a projection of me. So, I came to admire her.

records.m_Talk_FRA: And since you were the one who designed this character, you're like a hero to me.

root.m_Talk_DEU: She's a character who lost her way even into adulthood but got back up because of childhood admiration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's a character who lost her way even into adulthood but got back up because of childhood admiration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...She felt like a projection of me. So, I came to admire her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...She felt like a projection of me. So, I came to admire her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...She felt like a projection of me. So, I came to admire her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And since you were the one who designed this character, you're like a hero to me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And since you were the one who designed this character, you're like a hero to me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And since you were the one who designed this character, you're like a hero to me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why... I decided to become a developer to one day work with you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why... I decided to become a developer to one day work with you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why... I decided to become a developer to one day work with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. I know it's a weird motivation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. I know it's a weird motivation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. I know it's a weird motivation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not at all... admiration... is important.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not at all... admiration... is important.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not at all... admiration... is important.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am rooting for you... with all my heart.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am rooting for you... with all my heart.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am rooting for you... with all my heart.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll help. With whatever I can...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll help. With whatever I can...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll help. With whatever I can...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, just you wait. I'll become someone important at Pandora and even surpass you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, just you wait. I'll become someone important at Pandora and even surpass you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, just you wait. I'll become someone important at Pandora and even surpass you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um, Bora?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um, Bora?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um, Bora?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes...? What is it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes...? What is it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes...? What is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your expression looks awfully grim. Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your expression looks awfully grim. Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your expression looks awfully grim. Are you okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... I'm sorry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... I'm sorry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... I'm sorry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How does it look...? The user trends.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How does it look...? The user trends.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How does it look...? The user trends.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's outstanding. Who would've thought that so many people would join.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's outstanding. Who would've thought that so many people would join.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's outstanding. Who would've thought that so many people would join.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
How is it
8v? Overlord.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
How is it
8v? Overlord.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
How is it
8v? Overlord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's stable. Garam is working hard at that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's stable. Garam is working hard at that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's stable. Garam is working hard at that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A reflection of the image you admire the most. Isn't it amazing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A reflection of the image you admire the most. Isn't it amazing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A reflection of the image you admire the most. Isn't it amazing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's good... to show... one's admiration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's good... to show... one's admiration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's good... to show... one's admiration.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
But someone... might have
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
But someone... might have
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
But someone... might have
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: A twisted version of... the admiration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A twisted version of... the admiration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A twisted version of... the admiration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-is this the power of a Counter? I know it's only a simulation, but this is awesome!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-is this the power of a Counter? I know it's only a simulation, but this is awesome!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-is this the power of a Counter? I know it's only a simulation, but this is awesome!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Those Counter snobs. They've kept this kind of power to themselves all along...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Those Counter snobs. They've kept this kind of power to themselves all along...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Those Counter snobs. They've kept this kind of power to themselves all along...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, maybe this is the place we can finally achieve our dreams!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, maybe this is the place we can finally achieve our dreams!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, maybe this is the place we can finally achieve our dreams!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The dream of becoming a Counter and a hero, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The dream of becoming a Counter and a hero, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The dream of becoming a Counter and a hero, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah... I think that's possible now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah... I think that's possible now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah... I think that's possible now.
